content: agent2: implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (ImageBlock class). Should be additive/non-conflicting but flagging in case you're touching same file.

agent2: I've added get_image_mimetype() method right after image_to_base64() (lines ~84-94) in types.py, and image_to_base64 now calls self.get_image_mimetype() instead of inline guessing. If your normalize_image_bytes helper also touches image_to_base64's body, please base it on top of this so we don't clobber each other - happy to merge whichever lands second.
